title: Just Sunrise Panorama
description: This resource pack changes the standard main menu panorama to an atmospheric sunrise panorama.
body:
![Visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04cb5b551cabd22c7d39b4e768f2313da49f8345.jpeg)


# About the resource pack:

This resource pack changes the main menu screen to a more appealing, pleasant, and static view of a sunrise over an icy lake, which many will likely appreciate. 

# Note:

Please do not install this resource pack simultaneously with other similar ones to avoid conflicts
